summary: Completed comprehensive full-stack testing of Tealor Mode link-in-bio landing page. Backend APIs (8/8 tests passed), frontend functionality, and analytics integration all working correctly. Minor UI improvement needed for download loading state visibility.

ui_bugs.issue: Loading state 'Descargando...' not consistently visible during download clicks

passed_tests: API health check and all endpoints responding
Analytics tracking for download clicks (12 tracked)
Analytics tracking for social media clicks (6 tracked)
Social media links (YouTube, TikTok, Instagram) working correctly
Hover effects on all interactive elements
No horizontal scrolling issues on mobile
action_item_for_main_agent: Consider improving download button loading state visibility - the 'Descargando...' text should be more prominent during download clicks for better user feedback
